name: finding-experiments-agent-skill
description: Resolves a PostHog experiment reference from natural language to a concrete experiment ID by browsing `experiment-list` (not feature-flag tools), with disambiguation when multiple experiments match.
intent_triggers: use the finding experiments agent skill
run a workflow for finding experiments
